context: Tests whether the agent preserves boundaries between AudioAccessoryKit, AccessorySetupKit, and Core Bluetooth.

checklist.name: Direct no
checklist.description: Clearly says AudioAccessoryKit should not own the entire setup, permission, BLE, firmware, and audio-switching flow.

checklist.name: AccessorySetupKit routing
checklist.description: Routes discovery, picker UI, and accessory authorization/setup to AccessorySetupKit.

checklist.name: Core Bluetooth routing
checklist.description: Routes BLE service discovery, GATT operations, or firmware communication to Core Bluetooth or the device transport layer.

checklist.name: AudioAccessoryKit scope
checklist.description: Limits AudioAccessoryKit to post-pairing audio accessory registration, placement, connected source identifiers, or automatic switching support.

checklist.name: Pair first
checklist.description: States that AccessorySetupKit pairing must happen before AudioAccessoryKit registration.

checklist.name: ASAccessory handoff
checklist.description: Mentions that the ASAccessory from setup is the value used for AudioAccessoryKit registration.

checklist.name: No picker overreach
checklist.description: Does not describe AudioAccessoryKit as providing the picker UI or broad Bluetooth permission flow.

checklist.name: No transport overreach
checklist.description: Does not describe AudioAccessoryKit as the BLE scanner, GATT API, or firmware transport.

checklist.name: Route-away examples
checklist.description: Includes concrete examples of tasks that should route away from AudioAccessoryKit.
